meaning: adv.无限地,广大地,庞大地,非常
examples: His only experience of gardening so far proved immensely satisfying.
There is another problem: people become immensely inventive in hitting targets.
We also know that the global climate system is immensely complicated and that everything is in some way connected, and so the system is capable of fluctuating in unexpected ways.
While Avtovaz dealers like Berezovsky were becoming immensely wealthy, the automaker slid steadily into bankruptcy.
Marvin was immensely theatrical in his ability to create a mood with his music.
